text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something about the way Rice Shower is moving
while she trains seems off...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry... I think I pushed myself too hard in the
last race...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry... I think I pushed myself too hard in the
last race...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, but... I'm fine! No need to worry about me!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, but... I'm fine! No need to worry about me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she's still tired from her last race. I
might be pushing her too hard, so I'd better keep
an eye on her.
